sessions.title: Post to Discord when a new RSS item matches a…

messages.text: Post to Discord when a new RSS item matches a keyword
To create a workflow that posts to Discord when a new RSS item matches a keyword, we need to clarify a few details. We will use the RSS feed as the trigger and Discord as the action.

questions: What is the URL of the RSS feed you want to monitor?
What keyword do you want to match in the RSS items?
Which Discord channel do you want to post the matching items to?
suggestedTemplates: Monitor RSS feed for specific keywords and send email notifications
Post new RSS items to a Slack channel
Trigger a webhook when an RSS item matches a certain condition

messages.text: Post new RSS items to a Slack channel

To post new RSS items to a Slack channel, we need to define the specifics of the workflow. The RSS feed will serve as the trigger, and Slack will be the action. We'll need to determine the details of the RSS feed and the Slack channel.

questions: What is the URL of the RSS feed you want to monitor?
What is the name of the Slack channel where you want to post new RSS items?
suggestedTemplates: Post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel
Send new Reddit posts to a Discord server
Forward new email notifications to a Slack channel

messages.text: Post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel

To post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel, we'll need to define the specifics of the workflow. The GitHub issues will serve as the trigger, and Slack will be the action. We'll need to determine the details of the GitHub repository and the Slack channel. 
   Please consider the following:
   * Which GitHub repository should we monitor for new issues?
   * What type of issues should we post to Slack (e.g. all issues, issues with specific labels)?
   * Which Slack channel should we post the issues to?
   * What information about the issue should we include in the Slack post (e.g. title, description, assignee)?

questions: Which GitHub repository should we monitor for new issues?
What type of issues should we post to Slack?
suggestedTemplates: Post new GitHub issues with specific labels to a Slack channel
Post all new GitHub issues to a Slack channel
Post new GitHub issues assigned to a specific user to a Slack channel

sessions.title: Trigger a webhook when a Stripe payment fails

messages.text: Trigger a webhook when a Stripe payment fails

To create a workflow that triggers a webhook when a Stripe payment fails, we need more details. Please consider the following: 
   * What specific event in Stripe should trigger the webhook? Is it when a payment fails, or when a subscription is canceled due to a failed payment?
   * What information should be sent in the webhook? Should it include customer details, payment amount, or failure reason?
   * Are there any specific conditions or filters that should be applied before triggering the webhook, such as only for certain products or customers?

questions: What is the exact Stripe event that should trigger the webhook?
What details should be included in the webhook request?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure Notification
Stripe Subscription Cancellation Webhook
Stripe Payment Event Webhook

messages.text: Stripe Payment Failure Notification

To set up a workflow for sending a notification when a Stripe payment fails, we'll need to clarify a few details. 
   * The trigger will be based on the Stripe service and the event of a payment failure.
   * The action will involve sending a notification, possibly via email or a messaging platform.
   Please consider the following:
   - What service should be used for sending the notification (e.g., Gmail, Slack, Telegram)?
   - What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification (e.g., customer name, payment amount, failure reason)?
   - Are there any specific conditions under which the notification should or should not be sent?

questions: What service should be used for sending the notification (e.g., Gmail, Slack, Telegram)?
What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure to Slack Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Email Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Custom Webhook

messages.text: Stripe Payment Failure to Custom Webhook

To create a workflow that sends a notification to a custom webhook when a Stripe payment fails, we need to finalize a few details. 
   The trigger will be based on the Stripe service and the event of a payment failure. 
   The action will involve sending a request to a custom webhook.

questions: What specific details about the failed payment should be sent in the webhook request (e.g., payment amount, customer ID, failure reason)?
What is the URL of the custom webhook that should receive the notification?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure to Slack Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Email Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Custom API Endpoint

messages.text: Stripe Payment Failure to Slack Notification

To send a notification to Slack when a Stripe payment fails, we need to confirm a few details. 
   The trigger will be based on the Stripe service and the event of a payment failure. 
   The action will involve sending a message to a Slack channel. 
   Please consider the following:
   * Which Slack channel should receive the notification?
   * What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification (e.g., customer name, payment amount, failure reason)?

questions: Which Slack channel should receive the notification?
What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure to Email Notification
Stripe Payment Success to Slack Notification
